args_excerpt: {"node_id": "case_sentiment", "expression": "has(payload.body) && (payload.body.contains(\"感谢\") || payload.body.contains(\"满意\") || payload.body.contains(\"很好\") || payload.body.contains(\"开心\") || payload.body.contains(\"赞\") || payload.body.contains(\"优秀\") || payload.body.contains(\"顺利\") || payload.body.contains(\"喜欢\") || payload.body.contains(\"感谢\") || payload.body.contains(\"不错\") || payload.body.contains(\"great\") || payload.body.contains(\"good\") || payload.body.contains(\"happy\") || payload.body.contains(\"thank\") || payload.body.contains(\"excellent\") || payload.body.contains(\"love\"))", "branches": {"positive": {"to": "node_pos"}, "negative": {"to": "node_neg"}}}
